items.title: CONAB cuts Brazil corn output forecast amid Mato Grosso drought
items.author: Reuters
items.body: CONAB cut its Brazil corn output forecast as a prolonged dry spell scorched safrinha fields across Mato Grosso, with analysts warning of further downgrades.

items.title: Frost hit second corn in Parana over the weekend
items.author: u/agtrader
items.body: Producers in Parana report frost damage to late-planted safrinha corn, with some fields a total loss after temperatures dropped below zero.
